ABOUT $UPRINT

Hold • Earn • Repeat

USDC Printer ($UPRINT) is the revolutionary token that delivers USDC reflections directly to your wallet. The more you hold, the more you earn — creating a steady stream of passive income without lifting a finger.

Passive Income

Simply hold $UPRINT and watch your USDC balance grow with every transaction.

Community Driven

Built by holders, for holders. Join our thriving community today!

How to Buy $UPRINT

Follow these simple steps to start earning USDC rewards

1

Create a Wallet

Download MetaMask wallet.

2

Get ETH

Buy ETH on an exchange and send it to your wallet.

3

Go to Uniswap

Visit Uniswap DEX and connect your wallet.

4

Swap ETH for $UPRINT

Enter the $UPRINT token address and swap.

Phase 1

Launch, Community Building, Initial Marketing

Phase 2

Phase 3

Exchange Listings, Expanded Ecosystem
